envelope.subject: Shop reorder - hex nuts and R2 hose
envelope.body_text:
Hi,

Need to restock a couple items on the shop floor. Pulling the part numbers
off last month's invoice - please ship the following to the usual address
(2915 S Chase, Milwaukee):

1. 100 ea of FST-HXN-050-13-G5Z (hex nuts 1/2-13 grade 5 zinc)
2. 30 ft of HYD-HSE-R2-06 (100R2 hose dash-6, 3/8 ID)

Nothing urgent - normal ground is fine. Net 30 as always, invoice goes to
me at this email.

Thanks,
Tony Molinaro
Shop Foreman
M&M Machine & Fabrication
(414) 744-5602

Sent from my iPhone

classified_docs.intent_reasoning: This document is a purchase order. It contains: (1) a buyer identity (Tony Molinaro from M&M Machine & Fabrication), (2) specific line items with part numbers, quantities, and descriptions (FST-HXN-050-13-G5Z and HYD-HSE-R2-06), (3) delivery instructions (ship to 2915 S Chase, Milwaukee), and (4) payment terms (Net 30). While it lacks a formal PO number, it is clearly a request to buy goods with all the essential elements of a purchase order. The informal email format and reference to 'last month's invoice' suggests an established buyer-seller relationship. This is a legitimate purchase commitment, not an inquiry.

parsed.classification_rationale: The classification is 'purchase_order' because the document contains requests such as 'please ship the following to the usual address' and explicit item listings with quantities.

sub_documents.special_instructions: Nothing urgent - normal ground is fine. Net 30 as always, invoice goes to me at this email.

customer.name: M&M Machine & Fabrication
customer.notes: Mid-size machine shop, ~18 employees. Sends body-only emails for reorders, occasional hand-typed PDFs for larger jobs. Tony often forwards from his phone with 'Sent from my iPhone' footer.

confirmation_email.subject: Re: Shop reorder - hex nuts and R2 hose — confirmed, $127.40
confirmation_email.body:
Hello M&M Machine & Fabrication, thank you for your recent purchase order which has been auto-approved. We are currently processing your order for the following items:
  100 EA FST-HXN-050-13-G5Z  HEX NUT 1/2-13 GR5 ZP  @ $0.11  =  $11.00
  30 FT HYD-HSE-R2-06  HOSE 100R2 -6 3/8 ID  @ $3.88  =  $116.40
The total amount for this purchase is $127.40. We will ship your materials to 2915 S Chase Avenue, Milwaukee, WI 53207. Please note that the payment terms for this transaction are Net 30. We appreciate your business and will notify you as soon as your order has shipped.

Thanks,
Grafton-Reese MRO
orders@graftonreese.com

Ref: <20260424114200.9ab4.tony@mm-machineworks.com>
